_comment_2: Navigates the Coremail inbox and downloads attachments.
_comment_3: Assumes login has already been completed via himex_mail_login.json.

_comment_2: STEP 1: Navigate to the Coremail inbox
_comment_3: After SSO login, ensure we are in the inbox view.

_comment_2: STEP 2: Wait for the inbox to fully load
STEP 3: Click on the first unread email that has an attachment
_comment_3: Coremail marks emails with attachments using a clip/paperclip icon.
_comment_4: This selector targets the first email row containing an attachment indicator.

_comment_2: STEP 4: Wait for the email content and attachments to load
STEP 5: Click the 'Download All' button for attachments
_comment_3: Coremail displays attachments at the bottom of the reading pane.
_comment_4: The 'Download All' link packages all attachments into a zip.
target: xpath=//a[contains(@class,'downloadAll') or contains(text(),'Download All') or contains(text(),'Download all')]

_comment_2: STEP 6: Wait for the download to start and stabilize
_comment_3: The download detection is handled externally by main.py.
